name: The Team Captain and the Cheerleader
overview: It’s a contentious first meeting for Sevi and Elyse at the latter’s debut party. However, a mishap at the party signals the start of the two’s constant interaction, often to Elyse’s annoyance and Sevi’s amusement.

name: Nothings Into Somethings?
overview: Elyse loses a bet with Sevi. Even though it might just go against her values as a cheerleader, Elyse goes through with the consequence of losing the bet, leading to confused feelings for Sevi.

name: The Case of Forgotten Things
overview: Elyse and Sevi continue to hang out. But Elyse somehow starts feeling jealous of Luna.

name: Whatever You Call It
overview: Elyse and Sevi get into a fight and keep their distance from each other. They end up meeting again at a party. But it’s awkward. Can the two make up and get back to how they were before?

name: Your Biggest Fan
overview: Sevi admits his feelings for Elyse. But Elyse doesn’t really know how to respond to that. At the same time, they’re also both busy with their respective competitions.

name: Winner Takes All
overview: Elyse shows her support for Sevi during his game, leading to a great game for him. But Elyse has prepared an even bigger surprise for Sevi.

name: Life and Love and Seasons
overview: Elyse and Sevi continue to date but it seems it won’t be easy, especially having to hide their relationship from Alfred.

name: Milestones
overview: Elyse and Sevi look back on their relationship as they now finally move in together.

name: Unit 1432
overview: As Elyse and Sevi live in together, family problems trouble Sevi and keep him busy, leaving Elyse lonely.

name: The Mourning After
overview: Elyse and Sevi take a break from their relationship. Will they find their way back together again?

name: I Love You, But
overview: Elyse is still reeling from losing her mom. Could Sevi and Elyse’s relationship survive this tragedy?

name: The CEO and The Head Engineer
overview: Years after their break up, Elyse and Sevi find themselves having to work together on a project.

name: Breaking Ground
overview: Elyse finds herself in trouble. Despite the awkwardness, Sevi helps Elyse. But now, Sevi and Elyse are confused by all the mixed signals

name: Unit 1432, Part II
overview: Elyse ends up staying in the condo with Sevi, but only as housemates and co-owners of the condo. But it’s hard when the past always seems to creep back up.

name: Nostalgia Is A Dangerous Thing
overview: Elyse and Sevi start to see how living together with an ex is difficult. Aside from having to keep it a secret from others, feelings from the past get harder to deny.

name: Five Years of Remembering
overview: Afraid of the past repeating itself, Elyse decides to move out of their condo once again.

name: What are we?
overview: Elyse learns that Sevi was planning on gifting Elyse a ring. But Elyse doesn’t know what kind of ring it was, and more importantly, she doesn’t even know what the status of their relationship is.

name: Almost Happy Ending
overview: An accident has occurred at the Batangas site. Even worse, Sevi is being implicated in the incident.
